'''鈭歽-g-ng-f''' ('''kayagngefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:annalize|annalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-g-ng-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:annalize|annalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-g-ng-f
|-
! Lemma
| kayagngefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyagngefoko|thiyagngefoko]] || [[word:jiyagngefoko|jiyagngefoko]] || [[word:shiyagngefoko|shiyagngefoko]] || [[word:kiyagngefoko|kiyagngefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyagngefoko|thuthuyagngefoko]] || [[word:jujuyagngefoko|jujuyagngefoko]] || [[word:shushuyagngefoko|shushuyagngefoko]] || [[word:kukuyagngefoko|kukuyagngefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyagngefoko|thoyagngefoko]] || [[word:joyagngefoko|joyagngefoko]] || [[word:shoyagngefoko|shoyagngefoko]] || [[word:koyagngefoko|koyagngefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yagngefoko|th忙yagngefoko]] || [[word:j忙yagngefoko|j忙yagngefoko]] || [[word:sh忙yagngefoko|sh忙yagngefoko]] || [[word:k忙yagngefoko|k忙yagngefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayagngefoko|thayagngefoko]] || [[word:jayagngefoko|jayagngefoko]] || [[word:shayagngefoko|shayagngefoko]] || [[word:kayagngefoko|kayagngefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayagngefoko|thayagngefoko]] || [[word:jayagngefoko|jayagngefoko]] || [[word:shayagngefoko|shayagngefoko]] || [[word:kayagngefoko|kayagngefoko]]
